channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Lorde Uploads 49 Demos From Virgin for Album’s Anniversary
item.description: 🚨 Dive into Lorde's creative process with 49 unseen demos from her iconic album! 🎶✨ #LordeAnniversary #BehindTheScenes

item.title: Aaron Lewis Reacts After Shredded Copy Of His MAGA Album Cover Is Used As Taylor Swift Merch Packaging
item.description: Aaron Lewis: Rocking the headlines and the merch scene at the same time! 🎸🤯 #MusicMashup

item.title: Bob Dylan’s Live Band Shakes Up Guitarists Mid-Tour
item.description: 🎸 Bob Dylan's live band is keeping us on our toes with surprise guitarists! 🤩 Who's next to join the jam? 🎶 #MusicNews 🌟

item.title: The Pretty Reckless Unveil Dear God at Intimate Record Release Party: Photos + Setlist
item.description: Rocking out with The Pretty Reckless at their exclusive record release bash 🎸🔥 Check out all the VIP deets now! #RockNRollRoyalty

item.title: John Waters Unwraps 2026 Christmas Tour Dates
item.description: 🎄✨ Jingle all the way with John Waters on his merry 2026 Christmas Tour! Spread holiday cheer with the ultimate showman! 🎶🎁 #JohnWaters #ChristmasTour
